[2020-09-10 12:01] masn6811 (Masne98888): and its player dependent
[2020-09-10 12:01] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think im even skewer than average for p2
[2020-09-10 12:02] masn6811 (Masne98888): my prismata stats page says im 63/70
[2020-09-10 12:02] masn6811 (Masne98888): like i think p2 is just better in general
[2020-09-10 12:03] masn6811 (Masne98888): even in vivid sets, dd/1A, and then you have what, 9 gold, and two tarsiers and a vivid costs 10?
[2020-09-10 12:04] masn6811 (Masne98888): man, if fastimus was good, vivid fastimus is straight gas
[2020-09-10 12:04] masn6811 (Masne98888): the comparison is even better for p2 with doomed drone
[2020-09-10 12:04] masn6811 (Masne98888): also, they are so many small red units
[2020-09-10 12:05] masn6811 (Masne98888): but imo grimbotch is the most to blame, and it maybe should get nerfed
[2020-09-10 12:05] masn6811 (Masne98888): where fastimus has no counterplay and elyot animus just isnt good enough
[2020-09-10 12:05] masn6811 (Masne98888): because it takes an insane amount of support to make elyot animus work, its just too cutty
[2020-09-10 12:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): theres a ton of sets where it just loses to fastimus, even though conventional wisdom says that getting animus half a turn earlier wins
[2020-09-10 12:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): and as for conduit sets
[2020-09-10 12:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): the natural conduit is an insane amount of power and flexibility
[2020-09-10 12:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): even in high econ sets
[2020-09-10 12:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): when you toss alt drones into the mix
[2020-09-10 12:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): because p2 is quantatively better than p1 at the start of the game
[2020-09-10 12:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): like 8:7 is a smaller advantage than 7:6
[2020-09-10 12:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): and that tiny difference snowballs
[2020-09-10 12:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): p2's lines often involve floating gold
[2020-09-10 12:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): and that makes up for it
[2020-09-10 12:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): like if you consider standard lines
[2020-09-10 12:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): the floats are 0/1, 2/0
[2020-09-10 12:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): and p1 is just fucked
[2020-09-10 12:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): 0/1, 2/1 and p1 is still fucked
[2020-09-10 12:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): since even though that looks about "even", remember that the quantative advantage translates to about 1 early float
[2020-09-10 12:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): and also tempo on animus is kinda big
[2020-09-10 12:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): now on the other hand if you look at high econ lines
[2020-09-10 12:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): DD/DD 0/1 and it looks kinda even
[2020-09-10 12:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): DDE/DDE 0/2 and now p1 is pushing ahead
[2020-09-10 12:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): DDD/DDD 1/4 and p2's situation is plain tragic if he can't justify a conduit
[2020-09-10 12:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): DDDB/DDDB 0/4 and p2 is plain fucked at this point
[2020-09-10 12:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): but if you toss in an alt drone
[2020-09-10 12:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): DD/D1E with doomed as an example
[2020-09-10 12:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): neither side floats and p2 is looking pretty good
[2020-09-10 12:11] masn6811 (Masne98888): thorium dynamo + a 2e drone is a really solid opening for p2, you should try it sometime
[2020-09-10 12:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): but i say in general as the sets get bigger p2's advantage gets bigger
[2020-09-10 12:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): if p2 is skilled, since there's a bit more branching factor for them
[2020-09-10 12:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): like add green units and it helps p2
[2020-09-10 12:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): add reds, and it helps p2
[2020-09-10 12:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): add big blue and alt drones and it helps p2
[2020-09-10 12:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): so its only good for p1 in the rare sets which support big blue, but not green with it or alt drones
[2020-09-10 12:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): and btw, that argument does not work in reverse
[2020-09-10 12:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): like in a big blue set with doomed drone, p2's d1e opening is quite competitive
[2020-09-10 12:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): in a green-supporting set with doomed drone
[2020-09-10 12:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): p1's dd/11c is not at all competitive
[2020-09-10 12:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): heck, even in early animus sets where early doomed drones are a bit more justifiable
[2020-09-10 12:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): dd/dd 1a/11a is a situation id rather be p2 in unless both immolate AND grimbotch is in the set
[2020-09-10 12:16] masn6811 (Masne98888): and there had better be rager as well, or else dd/dd 1a/d1b kinda shuts it down
[2020-09-10 12:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): so TL;DR
green sets favor p2
blue sets favor p1
red sets favor p2
with alt drones:
green sets favor p2
blue sets favor p2
red sets favor p2
(in general)
yeah, life is unfair. deal with it
